description:
You are a data-engineer building a tiny proof-of-concept ETL pipeline for 2020 quarterly sales data that already exists on disk.  
    Work only in the user’s home directory: /home/user

    1. Input files  
       Four CSV files are already present inside /home/user/data/raw/  

       • /home/user/data/raw/sales_q1_2020.csv  
       • /home/user/data/raw/sales_q2_2020.csv  
       • /home/user/data/raw/sales_q3_2020.csv  
       • /home/user/data/raw/sales_q4_2020.csv  

       They all share the exact same header:

           Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice

       The rows in every file are comma-separated, UTF-8, UNIX-newline (\n) terminated, with no trailing blank lines and no double quotes around the fields.  
       DO NOT edit the four original files.

    2. Transformation requirements  
       a. Create a working directory /home/user/data/staging/ (if it does not exist).  
       b. Copy each raw file into that staging directory and, while copying, add a new final column named Revenue whose value is Units × UnitPrice.  
          • The new column header must be exactly Revenue (capital R, no spaces).  
          • The revenue value must be rendered with two decimal digits after the decimal point (e.g. 3060.00).  
          • Preserve the original column order; Revenue becomes column 7.  
       c. Combine (vertically concatenate) the four transformed files into a single file  
          /home/user/data/staging/all_sales_2020_enriched.csv  
          The combined file must contain a single header row followed by the eight data rows, in the order Q1 → Q2 → Q3 → Q4, each keeping the order they had in their respective source files.

    3. Aggregation requirements  
       a. Create /home/user/data/output/ (if it does not exist).  
       b. From all_sales_2020_enriched.csv calculate a regional summary: total units and total revenue per Region.  
          • Output file path: /home/user/data/output/quarterly_sales_2020_summary.csv  
          • Output format (comma-separated, UNIX-newline, UTF-8, no surrounding quotes):  

                Region,TotalUnits,TotalRevenue
                AMER,260,9555.00
                APAC,415,11550.00
                EMEA,355,11782.50

          • The file must be sorted alphabetically by the Region column (AMER, APAC, EMEA).  
          • TotalRevenue must be formatted with exactly two digits after the decimal point.

    4. Logging requirements  
       a. Create /home/user/logs/ if necessary.  
       b. Write a plain-text log file /home/user/logs/etl_2020.log that contains exactly five lines, each terminated with a UNIX newline.  
          Required content and order (case-sensitive):

                CREATE_STAGING OK
                ADD_REVENUE_COLUMN OK
                CONCATENATE OK
                AGGREGATE OK
                COMPLETE OK

    5. Verification hints  
       Automated tests will check:  
       • Existence and permissions (0644 or more permissive) of the three directories you might create.  
       • Exact byte-for-byte content of /home/user/data/staging/all_sales_2020_enriched.csv, /home/user/data/output/quarterly_sales_2020_summary.csv and /home/user/logs/etl_2020.log.  
       • That the four original raw files remain untouched.

    Your goal: make the system match everything described above.  Use whatever standard GNU/Linux command-line tools you prefer, but do NOT delete or rename any pre-existing files.  You do not have root access.
truth:
<!-- Ground-truth content of the raw files that already exist before the agent begins -->
    <preexisting>
        <file path="/home/user/data/raw/sales_q1_2020.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice
EMEA,Germany,Anna Schmidt,Widget A,120,25.50
APAC,Japan,Kenji Ito,Widget B,85,30.00
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/data/raw/sales_q2_2020.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice
EMEA,France,Jean Dupont,Widget A,95,25.50
AMER,USA,Maria Garcia,Widget C,150,45.00
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/data/raw/sales_q3_2020.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice
APAC,Australia,Liam Brown,Widget B,130,30.00
AMER,Canada,Noah Wilson,Widget A,110,25.50
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/data/raw/sales_q4_2020.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice
EMEA,Italy,Luca Rossi,Widget C,140,45.00
APAC,China,Wei Zhang,Widget A,200,25.50
]]></file>
    </preexisting>

    <!-- Ground-truth expected files after the agent finishes -->
    <expected>
        <file path="/home/user/data/staging/all_sales_2020_enriched.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,Country,SalesPerson,Product,Units,UnitPrice,Revenue
EMEA,Germany,Anna Schmidt,Widget A,120,25.50,3060.00
APAC,Japan,Kenji Ito,Widget B,85,30.00,2550.00
EMEA,France,Jean Dupont,Widget A,95,25.50,2422.50
AMER,USA,Maria Garcia,Widget C,150,45.00,6750.00
APAC,Australia,Liam Brown,Widget B,130,30.00,3900.00
AMER,Canada,Noah Wilson,Widget A,110,25.50,2805.00
EMEA,Italy,Luca Rossi,Widget C,140,45.00,6300.00
APAC,China,Wei Zhang,Widget A,200,25.50,5100.00
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/data/output/quarterly_sales_2020_summary.csv"><![CDATA[
Region,TotalUnits,TotalRevenue
AMER,260,9555.00
APAC,415,11550.00
EMEA,355,11782.50
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/logs/etl_2020.log"><![CDATA[
CREATE_STAGING OK
ADD_REVENUE_COLUMN OK
CONCATENATE OK
AGGREGATE OK
COMPLETE OK
]]></file>
    </expected>
